author: anon-13168fa2
content: Plan: Create 04-proving-it/ directory with 3 chapters. (1) On Your Own - capstone project, fully self-directed, must use something unfamiliar, full VDD cycle, higher bar than anything before. (2) Giving Back - mentoring newer apprentices, reviewing their work, writing about what you learned. (3) The Portfolio Review - assembling everything, submission criteria, what evaluators look for, the journeyman transition. These chapters are short on instruction and long on expectations. Phase 4 is about doing, not reading. Also update README with Phase 4 and remove 'coming soon' since everything will be written.
